text: The TUNEL kit (Beyotime, China) was used to evaluate cell death, following the manufacturer's protocol. Briefly, after samples were washed twice with PBS, 50 μl of TUNEL detection solution was added and incubated at 37°C in the dark for 60 minutes. Afterwards, samples were washed three times with PBS, mounted with anti-fade mounting medium, and observed under a fluorescence microscope.
